dj_text: Alright, switching it up! Rihanna - Umbrella [Bardcore / Medieval Style Cover] done. Here comes Harry Styles - Watermelon Sugar [Medieval Style Instrumental Cover / Bardcore]!

recovery_text: Someone's been poking holes in reality. I'm looking at you, chat.
title: Harry Styles - Watermelon Sugar [Medieval Style Instrumental Cover / Bardcore]
